candidate.title: RAG source-to-vector deletion, retention, access, PII, and evaluation governance evidence

repo_state.git_status_before_task: git status --short returned no changed paths before task-2 edits.

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Searched local raw/links and selected r6/r7 manifests for delete, deletion, retention, TTL, expire, VACUUM, orphan, PII, privacy, RBAC, access policy, security trimming, tenant, evaluation data, dataset governance, source-to-vector, vector delete, authorization, and permission terms. Existing raw notes covered table lifecycle, vector/index mechanics, DataHub/OpenLineage lineage, Langfuse RAG traces, and tenant/quota/cost boundaries, but lacked a bounded RAG access/deletion/PII/evaluation-governance note.
local_checks.wiki_search: Data RAG Pipeline and Vector Infrastructure already covered table deletes/retention and vector mechanics while explicitly leaving source-to-vector propagation, RAG access policy, and PII controls as gaps. Security Governance Cost Infrastructure covered tenant isolation, quota, cost, and capacity planning while explicitly leaving evaluation-data governance, RAG access policy, and deletion/retention governance as gaps.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md already routed Data RAG Pipeline Infrastructure, Data RAG Vector Infrastructure, Security Governance Cost Infrastructure, Evaluation Observability Reliability Infrastructure, and AI Infra Coverage Map; the task updated those existing reference boundaries instead of adding a new standalone page.

duplicate_checks.result: duplicate boundary for ingestion, workflow, lineage, table lifecycle, RAG tracing, and evaluation workflows; updated only with source deletion detection, document access metadata, PII masking, and evaluation dataset governance.
duplicate boundary for vector architecture and index mechanics; updated only with downstream delete/TTL/tenant-deletion controls.

duplicate boundary for platform tenant isolation, quota, cost, and capacity governance; updated with RAG access policy, PII, metadata policy, vector RBAC/tenancy, and evaluation dataset governance without repeating cost/capacity claims.
duplicate boundary for evaluation harnesses and tracing; not edited because Langfuse dataset governance is cited through the data/RAG and security pages while broader SLO/incident gaps remain.

selected_source_candidates.coverage: Milvus entity deletion and collection TTL; Qdrant delete-points by ids/filter; Weaviate object delete, TTL, multi-tenant deletion; Azure AI Search changed/deleted blob detection boundaries.

Azure AI Search document-level access control, security filters, chunk permission projection, and PII Detection skill; Azure Language PII; Weaviate RBAC/multi-tenancy; DataHub policies; Langfuse dataset versioning.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: No production incident or policy-enforcement failure source was selected because the task only found bounded product/control-plane documentation, not public postmortems with environment, impact, remediation, and ownership context.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Do not add production incident or policy-enforcement claims without concrete primary evidence.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: No crawler source subscription or Domain Channel was added; the sources are one-shot bounded official notes.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Prefer one-shot bounded raw notes unless repeated source refresh is proven necessary.

gap_reason: The local wiki and raw corpus already covered table lifecycle deletes/retention, vector index mechanics, lineage, RAG tracing, and platform quota/tenant/cost controls, but did not source RAG document ACL propagation, chunk permission projection, PII masking, vector-object delete/TTL controls, search-index source deletion detection, DataHub metadata policy, Weaviate RBAC/tenancy, or Langfuse evaluation dataset versioning. The new sources fill those bounded governance surfaces while leaving full end-to-end propagation, incident, SLO, drift, alerting, chargeback, and enforcement-run evidence open.
